response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with over 15 years in the industry, demonstrating strong proficiency in the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and secondary technologies like Java. His extensive background in TDD, cloud infrastructure (AWS, Kubernetes), and highly relevant recent experience with AI-agent development makes him an excellent fit for this Senior Fullstack role, despite missing explicit mentions of Nest.js and Vitest.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience utilizing the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and secondary technologies (Java).
Deep expertise in software testing, TDD, and CI/CD, including teaching courses and building custom test runners.
Recent and highly relevant experience building AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators.
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest, which are specifically requested in the primary stack.
A significant portion of his historical backend and open-source experience is in DLang, which is not utilized in this role.
Has maintained a concurrent founder role (GISCollective) since 2016, which may require clarification regarding time commitment.
